goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'museum'.
Make sure you get 'phone number', 'postcode', and 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 13:00' and should depart from 'ely'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should leave on 'thursday'.
Make sure you get 'train ID', 'travel time', and 'departure time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of museum
Make sure you get phone number, postcode, and address
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 13:00 and should depart from ely
The train should go to cambridge and should leave on thursday
Make sure you get train ID, travel time, and departure time
